title: Electronic device
abstract: An electronic device includes a housing assembly and a flexible display panel. The housing assembly includes a first housing, a second housing and a connecting module. The first housing has a first supporting surface and a first rear surface opposite to the first supporting surface. The second housing has a second supporting surface and a second rear surface opposite to the second supporting surface. The connecting module is located between and coupled to the first housing and the second housing. The flexible display panel is positioned on the first supporting surface of the first housing and the second supporting surface of the second housing. The first rear surface of the first housing is close to the second rear surface by rotating the first housing with respect to the second housing.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) AnĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â characterizedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â assembly,Ă‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â oppositeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surface; aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â oppositeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surface;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â connectingĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â betweenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â flexibleĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â panelĂ‚Â positionedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â supportingĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â closeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â rotatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â respectĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing. TheĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â claimedĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 10-11,Ă‚Â characterizedĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â assemblyĂ‚Â furtherĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â blockingĂ‚Â element,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â blockingĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â disposedĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â interiorĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â connectionĂ‚Â partĂ‚Â definesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â blockingĂ‚Â groove,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â blockingĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â slidablyĂ‚Â disposedĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â blockingĂ‚Â grooveĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â preventĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â connectionĂ‚Â partĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â slidingĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â respectĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing. TheĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â claimedĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 5-12,Ă‚Â characterizedĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â couplingĂ‚Â memberĂ‚Â furtherĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â dampingĂ‚Â mechanismĂ‚Â disposedĂ‚Â betweenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â element,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â dampingĂ‚Â mechanismĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â providingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â dampingĂ‚Â forceĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â duringĂ‚Â rotatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â respectĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â hingeĂ‚Â element. AnĂ‚Â electricĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â characterizedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housing; aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing; aĂ‚Â connectingĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â flexibleĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â panelĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surface,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â positionedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housing,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â positionedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing; wherein,Ă‚Â byĂ‚Â rotationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â housingĂ‚Â relativeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â housing,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â flexibleĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â panelĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â transitionableĂ‚Â between:Ă‚Â (i)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â configurationĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â whichĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â coplanarĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surface,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â (ii)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â configurationĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â whichĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â noncoplanarĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surface. AnĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â characterizedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â oppositeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surface;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â havingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â oppositeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â surface;Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â closeĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â rearĂ‚Â surfaceĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â rotatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portionĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â respectĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â displayĂ‚Â portion.
